headers.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy
headers.detail: The target did not return a Content-Security-Policy header, which can increase exposure to client-side injection risks.

headers.title: Missing X-Frame-Options
headers.detail: The target did not return an X-Frame-Options header, which may increase clickjacking exposure.

cookies.title: Cookie missing Secure flag
cookies.detail: A session-related cookie was observed without the Secure attribute.

forms.title: Login form discovered
forms.detail: A login-style form was detected with username/email and password input fields.

links.title: External links present
links.detail: The page contains external links that may be relevant for manual review.

technology.title: Visible server technology indicator
technology.detail: The response exposed a visible server technology banner in the headers.

recommendations: Add a Content-Security-Policy header appropriate to the application.
Set missing cookie security flags such as Secure and HttpOnly where applicable.
Review exposed forms and ensure CSRF and input validation controls are in place.
